prediction.reasoning: The point estimate and confidence intervals are hypothetical and based on an assumed model of modest growth over the next 7 days. The actual stock price will be influenced by market conditions, company performance, investor sentiment, and broader economic factors which are not accounted for in this simplistic model. Historical volatility and normal market fluctuations were considered in determining the width of the confidence intervals, but these are only illustrative and should not be taken as financial advice.
